title: LAURELWOOD CENTER - 211info
text: LAURELWOOD CENTER LAURELWOOD CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Shelter and service center for up to 120 people experiencing homelessness. The site has a space for coffee and tea, books and board games, a gated courtyard, showers and laundry, space to leave belongings during the day and provides onsite meals. Staff will provide housing-focused support, employment and benefits assistance, and health-focused services. Beds at a shelter are not guaranteed. 6130 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older or couples (any two people who present as a couple, regardless of gender) who are experiencing homelessness. Priority is given to people age 55 and older, adults with disabilities, and veterans. Pets allowed; must be housebroken, and the owner is responsible for caring for, feeding, and cleaning up after the animal Hours: Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Resource Center (in person or phone): Monday-Friday 8:30am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday/all holidays 8:30am-3pm; service intakes end 15 minutes before close (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 280-4700 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Standard Intake procedure: -Visit website to submit a Shelter Access Pre-Screening Form, or walk in or call the Resource Center (650 NW Irving Street, Portland, OR 97209) to sign up for a shelter bed. A team member responds to all submissions to gather more information. -Reservations only and no intake at the shelter's physical location; without a reservation, people will be turned away. Once a space is reserved, the guest may continue to use the space until they no longer need it. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 17, 14 Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Community Shelters * Homeless Couples Community Shelters * Homeless Veterans Community Shelters * Homeless Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LAURELWOOD CENTER
